title: rubus corylifolius subsp. nemoralis
intro: Rubus corylifolius subsp. nemoralis is a subspecies of the blackberry plant, known scientifically as Rubus fruticosus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Rubus corylifolius subsp. nemoralis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems. Additionally, it is also used as a diuretic to help reduce fluid retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary issues.
